topic.ja: ぱーてぃーの　にんずう
topic.fr: Nombre de participants à la fête

ja.intro: だいがくで　おとこのがくせいと　おんなのがくせいが　はなしています。あしたの　ぱーてぃーに　なんにん　きますか。

dialogue.speaker: おとこのがくせい
dialogue.text: あしたの　ぱーてぃーは　なんにん　きますか。

dialogue.speaker: おんなのがくせい
dialogue.text: くらすは　にじゅうにんですが　こない　ひとが　よにん　います。

dialogue.speaker: おとこのがくせい
dialogue.text: じゃあ　じゅうろくにんですね。せんせいも　きますか。

dialogue.speaker: おんなのがくせい
dialogue.text: はい、やまだせんせいと　さとうせんせいが　きます。

dialogue.speaker: おとこのがくせい
dialogue.text: じゃあ　ぜんぶで　じゅうはちにんですね。

ja.question: あしたの　ぱーてぃーに　なんにん　きますか。

tr.intro: Üniversitede bir erkek öğrenci ve bir kız öğrenci konuşuyor. Yarınki partiye kaç kişi gelecek?

dialogue.speaker: Erkek Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Erkek öğrenci: Yarınki partiye kaç kişi gelecek?

dialogue.speaker: Kız Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Kız öğrenci: Sınıf yirmi kişi ama gelmeyecek dört kişi var.

dialogue.speaker: Erkek Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Erkek öğrenci: O zaman on altı kişi, değil mi? Öğretmenler de gelecek mi?

dialogue.speaker: Kız Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Kız öğrenci: Evet, Yamada Sensei ve Sato Sensei gelecek.

dialogue.speaker: Erkek Öğrenci
dialogue.text: Erkek öğrenci: O zaman toplamda on sekiz kişi, değil mi?

tr.question: Yarınki partiye kaç kişi gelecek?

en.intro: A male student and a female student are talking at university. How many people will come to tomorrow's party?

dialogue.speaker: Male Student
dialogue.text: Male student: How many people are coming to tomorrow's party?

dialogue.speaker: Female Student
dialogue.text: Female student: The class has twenty people, but there are four people who won't come.

dialogue.speaker: Male Student
dialogue.text: Male student: So, sixteen people, right? Are the teachers coming too?

dialogue.speaker: Female Student
dialogue.text: Female student: Yes, Mr. Yamada and Ms. Sato are coming.

dialogue.speaker: Male Student
dialogue.text: Male student: So, eighteen people in total, right?

en.question: How many people will come to tomorrow's party?

de.intro: Ein männlicher Student und eine weibliche Studentin unterhalten sich an der Universität. Wie viele Leute werden zur morgigen Party kommen?

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: Männlicher Student: Wie viele Leute kommen zur morgigen Party?

dialogue.speaker: Studentin
dialogue.text: Weibliche Studentin: Die Klasse hat zwanzig Leute, aber vier Leute kommen nicht.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: Männlicher Student: Also sechzehn Leute, richtig? Kommen die Lehrer auch?

dialogue.speaker: Studentin
dialogue.text: Weibliche Studentin: Ja, Herr Yamada und Frau Sato kommen.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.text: Männlicher Student: Also insgesamt achtzehn Leute, richtig?

de.question: Wie viele Leute werden zur morgigen Party kommen?

fr.intro: Un étudiant et une étudiante parlent à l'université. Combien de personnes viendront à la fête de demain ?

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant
dialogue.text: Étudiant: Combien de personnes viennent à la fête de demain ?

dialogue.speaker: Étudiante
dialogue.text: Étudiante: La classe compte vingt personnes, mais il y a quatre personnes qui ne viendront pas.

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant
dialogue.text: Étudiant: Donc seize personnes, n'est-ce pas ? Les professeurs viennent aussi ?

dialogue.speaker: Étudiante
dialogue.text: Étudiante: Oui, Monsieur Yamada et Madame Sato viennent.

dialogue.speaker: Étudiant
dialogue.text: Étudiant: Donc dix-huit personnes au total, n'est-ce pas ?

fr.question: Combien de personnes viendront à la fête de demain ?

es.intro: Un estudiante y una estudiante están hablando en la universidad. ¿Cuántas personas vendrán a la fiesta de mañana?

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Estudiante (masculino): ¿Cuántas personas vienen a la fiesta de mañana?

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Estudiante (femenina): La clase tiene veinte personas, pero hay cuatro que no vendrán.

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Estudiante (masculino): Entonces, dieciséis personas, ¿verdad? ¿Vienen también los profesores?

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Estudiante (femenina): Sí, el profesor Yamada y la profesora Sato vienen.

dialogue.speaker: Estudiante
dialogue.text: Estudiante (masculino): Entonces, en total dieciocho personas, ¿verdad?

es.question: ¿Cuántas personas vendrán a la fiesta de mañana?

ko.intro: 대학교에서 남학생과 여학생이 이야기하고 있습니다. 내일 파티에 몇 명이나 올까요?

dialogue.speaker: 남학생
dialogue.text: 남학생: 내일 파티에 몇 명이나 와요?

dialogue.speaker: 여학생
dialogue.text: 여학생: 반은 스무 명인데, 안 오는 사람이 네 명 있어요.

dialogue.speaker: 남학생
dialogue.text: 남학생: 그럼 열여섯 명이네요. 선생님도 오세요?

dialogue.speaker: 여학생
dialogue.text: 여학생: 네, 야마다 선생님과 사토 선생님이 오세요.

dialogue.speaker: 남학생
dialogue.text: 남학생: 그럼 전부 합해서 열여덟 명이네요.

ko.question: 내일 파티에 몇 명이나 올까요?

logic.tr: Sınıf 20 kişi, 4'ü gelmiyor = 16 öğrenci. 2 öğretmen katılıyor. Toplam 16 + 2 = 18 kişi. Doğru cevap じゅうはちにん (18).
logic.en: Class has 20 students, 4 won't come = 16 students. 2 teachers attending. Total: 16 + 2 = 18. Correct: じゅうはちにん (18).
logic.de: Die Klasse hat 20 Personen, 4 kommen nicht = 16 Studenten. 2 Lehrer nehmen teil. Gesamt: 16 + 2 = 18. Richtig: じゅうはちにん (18).
logic.fr: La classe compte 20 personnes, 4 ne viendront pas = 16 étudiants. 2 professeurs participent. Total : 16 + 2 = 18. Correct : じゅうはちにん (18).
logic.es: La clase tiene 20 personas, 4 no vendrán = 16 estudiantes. 2 profesores asisten. Total: 16 + 2 = 18. Correcto: じゅうはちにん (18).
logic.ko: 반은 20명, 4명은 안 옴 = 학생 16명. 선생님 2명 참석. 총 16 + 2 = 18명. 정답은 じゅうはちにん (18).
